name: Cranapple Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
1. In a small bowl, beat together softened butter and vanilla.
2. Gradually add milk to the mixture, beating until smooth.
3. Gradually add confectioners' sugar to the mixture, beating until smooth and spreadable.
Heat oven to 325°F. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt. In a large bowl, with an electric mixer, beat applesauce, brown sugar, egg whites, and oil until well mixed. Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients, beating until smooth. Fold in cranberries and shredded apple. Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake 55 to 60 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool cake in pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Loosen the edge of the cake; invert the pan and unmold the cake onto a wire rack, allowing it to cool completely. Place the cooled cake on a serving plate.
Prepare icing by beating butter with milk and vanilla until smooth. Gradually beat in confectioners' sugar until the icing is smooth and spreadable. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
